name: Almond Joy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler using 1 can of sweetened condensed milk.
2. Stir until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
3. Pour the melted chocolate over the bowl containing 3 cups of sweetened flaked coconut.
4. Add 1 teaspoon of vanilla extract and a pinch of salt, mixing thoroughly to coat the coconut evenly.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Press a whole almond into the top of each cookie.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes, checking at 8 minutes as the bottoms may brown quickly.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
